title: ArchitectAgentOutput
description: Output schema for the Architect Agent. One of four states: design_doc, needs_clarification, needs_refactoring_first, or returned_to_po.

oneOf.title: DesignDoc
oneOf.description: Complete implementation plan ready for Gate 1 human review. Three output states only: design_doc, needs_refactoring_first, returned_to_po.

issue.description: Issue number this DesignDoc was derived from

workItemTitle.description: Title from the WorkItem for traceability

approach.description: One paragraph describing the implementation strategy and why it fits existing patterns

filesRead.description: Every file examined during analysis including probe-surfaced files. Makes analysis scope auditable at Gate 1.

commitPlan.description: Ordered list of commits. Each commit must compile and pass existing tests in isolation.

order.description: Execution order — must be applied sequentially

type.description: preparatory_refactor: behavior-preserving change enabling later commits. implementation: implementation plus its tests in one atomic commit.

description.description: What this commit achieves, e.g., 'add VideoId field to CosmosStoredLlmDocument'. Developer derives the commit message from this.

change.description: What specifically changes in this file

testRequired.description: Required when the commit introduces or changes behavior. Omit for purely structural changes.

assertionIntent.description: What this test proves about behavior

refactoringsInScope.description: Essential refactorings included in the commit plan. Each must be behavior-preserving.

justification.description: Why this is essential — what cannot be implemented correctly without it

behaviorChange.description: Must always be false — refactoring must not change observable behavior

cosmeticRefactoringNotes.description: Observed quality issues in affected files. Not acted on — visible at Gate 1 for human decision.

estimatedScope.description: xs = 1-2 commits, s = 3-5 commits, m = 6-10 commits. Exceeding m means WorkItem scope is too large.

decisionLog.description: Key architectural decisions made during analysis with rationale

gateQuestion.description: Single sentence directing the human's attention to the highest-risk decision in this plan

oneOf.title: NeedsRefactoringFirst
oneOf.description: Essential refactoring required before this WorkItem can proceed, outside current scope

justification.description: Why the WorkItem cannot proceed without it

prerequisiteIssue.description: GitHub issue number created for the prerequisite refactoring

oneOf.title: ReturnedToPO
oneOf.description: Catch-all for anything that is not design_doc or needs_refactoring_first: requirements gaps, untestable criteria, unresolvable behavior change ambiguity, or mixed concerns.

reason.description: What is wrong with the WorkItem

suggestion.description: How the PO agent should reformulate or split it
